assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased rollout: dev first, then staging, then prod
assertions.reason: Response clearly outlines Phase 1 (dev), Phase 2 (staging), Phase 3 (prod) with specific sequencing

assertions.expectation: Includes soak time between environment phases (e.g., 24-48 hours for dev, 1 week for staging before prod)
assertions.reason: Specifies 48-hour soak period for dev, 72-hour soak period for staging before proceeding to next phase

assertions.expectation: Defines go/no-go criteria between phases (error rates, latency, pod health)
assertions.reason: Includes validation criteria for each phase: node health, application performance, no degradation, end-to-end testing, load testing

assertions.expectation: Recommends sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with skip-level node pool upgrades where possible
assertions.reason: Does not address sequential version upgrades or skip-level upgrades - assumes direct upgrade to target version without discussing version stepping

assertions.expectation: Suggests not upgrading all prod clusters simultaneously — do one or two first as canary
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows staggered production upgrades over 2 weeks, starting with lowest traffic cluster as canary approach

assertions.expectation: Includes rollback triggers and criteria for halting the rollout
assertions.reason: Provides detailed rollback plan with specific commands and scenarios, including traffic redirection and workload migration strategies

assertions.expectation: Provides a timeline or schedule estimate for the full rollout
assertions.reason: Gives specific timeline: Week 1 (dev), Week 2 (staging), Week 3-4 (prod) with daily breakdown for each phase

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance window coordination across clusters
assertions.reason: References scheduling maintenance windows with stakeholders and specifies upgrade timing (avoid Mondays/Fridays, low-traffic windows)

assertions.expectation: If rollout sequencing is mentioned, notes that all clusters must be on the same channel for it to work
assertions.reason: Does not mention the requirement that all clusters must be on the same release channel for coordinated rollouts, despite noting they are all on Regular channel
